# Chapter 17 Manual Meters

Manual meter entries are required for machines that do not communicate with the system and
require manual reading of the meters.


## 17.1 Viewing Manual Meters

To view manual meters:

Select Enter Manual Meters in the Period Timeline or in the User Tasks list. The Manual
Meters window appears.




![Figure 17-1 Manual Meters](MachineAccounting_UserGuide_images/217.2.png)




## 17.2 Adjusting Manual Meters

To adjust manual meters:

1\. Click Enter Manual Meters in the Period Timeline or in the User Tasks list. The
Manual Meters window appears.

2\. Select an individual machine.

3\. Click Meters. The Additional Meter Adjustments window appears.

4\. Enter revisions in the applicable New Value fields.

5\. Click Save. The manual meter is adjusted.


## 17.3 Entering New Manual Meters

To enter a new manual meter:

1\. Click Enter Manual Meters in the Period Timeline or in the User Tasks list. The
Manual Meters window appears.

2\. Click New Entry. The Additional Meter Adjustments window appears.

3\. Enter revisions in the applicable New Value fields.

4\. Click Save. The new manual meter is saved.
